mechanism_narrative: Near-zero federal funds rate eliminates discount rate pressure on equity valuations, supporting positive forward returns as investors seek yield in risk assets.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are negative in >65% of months where FEDFUNDS < 0.25%.

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rate exceeding 8.5% signals severe labor market slack that suppresses consumer spending and corporate earnings, driving negative S&P 500 returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are positive in >55% of observations when UNRATE > 8.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Rising personal savings rate alongside increasing housing starts reflects improved household balance sheets and construction sector recovery, generating positive equity returns over one month.
failure_condition: Joint ranking of RSAFS and HOUST yields Rank IC < 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production index falling below 95.0 during a high-unemployment regime reflects weak domestic manufacturing demand that immediately pressures equity prices over the next week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are non-negative in >60% of instances when INDPRO < 95.0 and UNRATE > 8.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer price index combined with a stagnant federal funds rate creates real negative interest rates, prompting portfolio reallocation into equities and driving positive quarterly returns.
failure_condition: Quarterly returns are negative in >50% of months where CPIAUCSL rises and FEDFUNDS remains flat.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month increases in total nonfarm payrolls directly boost aggregate income expectations, producing a statistically significant positive drift in S&P 500 prices over the following month.
failure_condition: Sign of PAYEMS change matches sign of 20d SPX return in <52% of cases over a 5-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly GDP growth falling below 1.5% annualized rate triggers recession fears that immediately depress equity valuations over the subsequent trading week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in >65% of quarters where annualized GDP growth < 1.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between industrial production and housing starts, where manufacturing contracts while construction expands, signals sector rotation that generates positive broad market returns over one month.
failure_condition: Divergence periods yield negative 20d returns in >55% of cases.
